title: Wild Swords
overview: The thief Guo Changsheng was arrested by a mysterious white man. When he was washing his hands with a golden bowl, he agreed to escort them. On the way, all the masters of the road were willing to enmity, and they also brought out the blood of the unnamed door 15 years ago. - Everyone's story leads to different facts. What is the truth?
